name: Bennetts Creek BESS
current_developer: Bennetts Creek Energy Project Pty Ltd in its capacity as Trustee for the Bennetts Creek Energy Project Trust
notable: 110 MW / 220 MWh BESS near Gloucester, NSW. AGL Energy project supporting Hunter Valley grid stability.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2028-03 to 2028-03-30 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

eis_specs.document_title: Bennetts Creek BESS Planning Permit (VIC DEECA)
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Bennetts Creek 66/22 kV substation (AusNet Services), Western Victoria
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~8 km of 66 kV connection to AusNet Services 66 kV network, Western Victoria.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 66 kV connection to AusNet Services. Bennetts Creek area in Western VIC has growing renewable cluster requiring AusNet network upgrades.
eis_specs.notes: 100 MW / 223 MWh (~2.2-hour) BESS, Bennetts Creek, Western Victoria. Developer: Tilt Renewables. Technology: Wartsila Quantum (LFP, CATL cells). EPC: Zenviron / Wartsila. VIC planning approval 2022. Under construction 2024. AusNet 66 kV connection. Co-located with adjacent wind farm in Western VIC renewable precinct.
